================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 4B 29 A7 D2 48
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1875
Reflected CC   : 0x1A
RetType        : 0x05
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 124

ReflectedCC  : 0x1A
PayloadLen   : 124

[Inputs]
c_in[0..5]: 173 181 94 93 14 12

vbat: 16066

temp[0..2]: 187 188 188

dac_en[0..2]: 1 1 1

bootcause : 3054645112
bootcnt   : 1
uptime    : 142
resetcause: 0x6E17

[MPPT Timing]
mppt_time  : 12

[Device]
device_type[0..7]: 22 0 49 0 0 0 7 1

[WDT]
